name: rustpilot
description: Open-source management app for local Rust Dedicated Servers.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @rustpilot/shared && npm run build -w @rustpilot/rust-adapter && concurrently -k -n server,web "npm run dev -w @rustpilot/server" "npm run dev -w @rustpilot/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @rustpilot/shared && npm run build -w @rustpilot/rust-adapter && npm run build -w @rustpilot/server && npm run build -w @rustpilot/web
